title: Today, California Governor Newsom signed AB 1171 that modernizes California’s spousal rape law. A strong coalition of woman’s justice advocates and reform minded prosecutors joined
prompt_preview:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1171 modernizes California's spousal rape law by eliminating the 'spousal rape exception' in the California Penal Code.",
    "AB 1171 requires the same standards for 'spousal rape' as those currently in the penal code for rape.",
    "California is one of nine states that distinguishes 'spousal rape' from 'rape.'",
    "According to the National Coalition Against Domestic Violence, between 10-14% of married women have been or may experience rape by their spouse.",
    "18% of victims of spousal rape state their children have witnessed the rape."
  ]
}
```
